Container.Name: OpenHands
Container.Overview: OpenHands is an open-source AI-driven development agent. It writes, reviews, and tests code. Important: Requires access to the Docker socket to spin up isolated execution environments. Pre-configured for local Ollama use.
Container.DonateText: If this template helps you, consider buying me a coffee.
Container.Requires: A reachable Ollama instance (or any OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint) configured via the LLM_* variables. Defaults assume Ollama running on the Unraid host, reachable via host.docker.internal.

Config.Name: Workspace Directory
Config.Description: Working directory exposed to the agent

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Required so OpenHands can spawn isolated sandbox containers

Config.Name: Sandbox Volumes
Config.Description: Host:container mount(s) injected into every sandbox container the agent spins up. Must match the Workspace Directory mapping.

Config.Name: LLM API Key
Config.Description: API key for the LLM backend. For Ollama any non-empty value works (e.g. 'ollama').

Config.Name: LLM Model
Config.Description: LiteLLM-style model string. Default targets Ollama with qwen2.5-coder:14b.

Config.Name: LLM Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL of the LLM endpoint. Default reaches Ollama on the Unraid host via host.docker.internal. For a remote/LAN Ollama use http://<host>:11434. Leave blank for hosted providers (OpenAI/Anthropic/etc.) that use their own endpoints.

Config.Name: LLM Embedding Model
Config.Description: Embedding model used for memory/context. 'local' uses the bundled embedding model.
